name: Mermaids
teaser: Move other players' minions to your minions' bases and reduce their power contribution to their total power.
mechanics: Move other players' minions to your minions' bases and reduce their power contribution to their total power.
description: The Mermaids faction is part of the 10th Anniversary set, one of four unique factions introduced in this expansion. Although the set doesn't include a traditional rulebook, the Mermaids' playstyle is centered around manipulating the board by moving other players' minions to bases where they have a presence, and diminishing the power contributions of opposing minions. With a medium-high complexity rating, this faction requires strategic thinking. The 10th Anniversary set also features the Sheep, Skeletons, and World Champs factions, each offering distinct gameplay experiences.
cardsTeaser:
The Mermaids faction is comprised of 10 minions and 10 actions, offering a balanced mix of cards to play with. Their minions boast a total base power of 30, averaging 3 power per minion.

A closer look at their actions reveals a diverse set, including three play-on-base actions: Becalmed Shores, Desert Island, and Shipwreck Cove. The remainder of their actions are standard, with seven in total, such as Captive Audience, Charmed, Siren Song, Toll Bay, and Ultimate Song - six of which affect one or more minions. Notably, three actions - Captive Audience and Shipwreck Cove - are designed to directly enhance a minion's power, while Captive Audience appears twice in the faction's action lineup.
actionTeaser: The Mermaids faction excels at manipulating minions and bases, using their aquatic abilities to move and control the flow of battle. By leveraging their unique powers, Mermaids can outmaneuver their opponents and claim victory.
actionList:
1x Becalmed Shores - Play on a base. Ongoing: Other players’ minions here have -1 power. Talent: Transfer this action to another base.
2x Captive Audience - Choose a base. One of your minions there gains +1 power until the end of the turn for each minion there you don’t own. Play an extra action.
2x Charmed - Choose a minion of power 3 or less. You may move it to another base where you have a minion. It doesn’t add its power to its controller’s total until the end of the turn. Play an extra action.
1x Desert Island - Play on a base. Ongoing: Minions here do not add their power to their controllers’ totals. Destroy this card at the start of your turn.
1x Shipwreck Cove - Play on a base. Ongoing: Your minions here each have +1 power. Special: After this base scores, you may transfer this card to another base.
1x Siren Song - Choose a base. Move one of each other player’s minions there to one other base where you have a minion.
1x Toll Bay - Choose a base. Draw a card for each other player’s minion there.
1x Ultimate Song - Choose a base where you have a minion. Each other player must play a minion there of power 3 or less as an extra minion or reveal a hand with no such minions. Cancel those minions’ abilities until the end of the turn. You may play an extra minion there and/or an extra action.
actions:
1x Becalmed Shores - Play on a base. Ongoing: Other players’ minions here have -1 power. Talent: Transfer this action to another base.

2x Captive Audience - Choose a base. One of your minions there gains +1 power until the end of the turn for each minion there you don’t own. Play an extra action.

2x Charmed - Choose a minion of power 3 or less. You may move it to another base where you have a minion. It doesn’t add its power to its controller’s total until the end of the turn. Play an extra action.

1x Desert Island - Play on a base. Ongoing: Minions here do not add their power to their controllers’ totals. Destroy this card at the start of your turn.

1x Shipwreck Cove - Play on a base. Ongoing: Your minions here each have +1 power. Special: After this base scores, you may transfer this card to another base.

1x Siren Song - Choose a base. Move one of each other player’s minions there to one other base where you have a minion.

1x Toll Bay - Choose a base. Draw a card for each other player’s minion there.

1x Ultimate Song - Choose a base where you have a minion. Each other player must play a minion there of power 3 or less as an extra minion or reveal a hand with no such minions. Cancel those minions’ abilities until the end of the turn. You may play an extra minion there and/or an extra action.

[FACTION ICON]
characters:
1x Mermaid Queen - power 5 - Move another player’s minion to here or choose a minion here. If it has 3 or less power, take control of it until the end of the turn.

2x Temptress - power 4 - Ongoing: If one or more minions of other players have moved to here during this turn, this minion has +2 power until the end of the turn.

3x Charmer - power 3 - Talent: You may move this minion to another base. Then you may move another player’s minion of power 3 or less to this minion’s base.

4x Siren - power 2 - Ongoing: Other players’ minions here add 1 less power to their controller’s total.
clarifications: There are no official clarifications for this faction as no rulebook was made for the 10th Anniversary set.
synergy:
Mermaids form powerful alliances with several factions to maximize their strategic movement capabilities. Pairing with Pirates allows Mermaids to position minions precisely, leveraging Shipwreck Cove to boost the power of First Mates. While Pirates' destructive effects may not be as beneficial, Becalmed Shores can set up power 3 minions for Cannon or Broadside Range attacks.

Dragons make ideal partners, as their effects like Hatchling and Imperial Dragon are triggered by minions moving into their base, which Mermaids can facilitate. Sharks also thrive alongside Mermaids, who can lure minions into the Sharks' deadly feeding frenzy, with Becalmed Shores disguising the threat of Great Whites and Megalodon.

Tornados, with their affinity for movement, complement Mermaids perfectly, helping to position minions for optimal effect. In return, Mermaids' power-adjusting effects enhance Tornados' capabilities. Ignobles benefit from Mermaids' ability to build a Captive Audience, easily accumulated by gifting minions to other players. Meanwhile, Sheep naturally follow moving minions, making Mermaids a great match, as they excel at relocating other players' minions to their advantage.

name: Sheep
teaser: Move your minions around, especially after another minion moves, gain benefits for moving your minions and repeat other players' actions.
mechanics: Move your minions around, especially after another minion moves, gain benefits for moving your minions and repeat other players' actions.
description:
The Sheep faction, previously a promotional giveaway and later available for purchase, is now part of the 10th Anniversary set. Initially, this set was known as "Sheep!" in the online insert, but it's also referred to as "Smash Up Sheep Promo" on the divider in The Bigger Geekier Box.

Without an official rulebook or flavor text, the Sheep faction's playstyle is described in The Bigger Geekier Box rulebook as focusing on minion movement and manipulating cards from both your own deck and those of your opponents. This allows for dynamic gameplay and strategic card play.

The Sheep faction has a complexity rating of Medium-High, indicating a need for thoughtful planning and execution. As part of the 10th Anniversary set, the Sheep join other factions like the Mermaids, Skeletons, and World Champs, offering a unique set of abilities to distinguish them from other playable factions.
cardsTeaser:
The Sheep faction boasts a standard roster of 10 minions and 10 actions. Notably, their minions pack a significant punch, with a total base power of 33, averaging 3.3 power per minion - a step above the typical 30 total power and 3 average.

Their action cards are divided into several categories, including two that can be played on minions: In Sheep's Clothing and Shearing. There's also one action, Counting Sheep, that can be played on a base. The remaining actions include six standard ones, with three of these - Ewe Shall Pass, On the Lamb, To Follow, or Not?, and Wood for Sheep - having effects on one or more minions. None of the actions directly boost a minion's power, although Hello, Dolly! has the unique ability to copy any type of action.
actionList:
1x Counting Sheep - Play on a base. Ongoing: Once per turn, after the power of another player’s minion increases, your minions here gain +1 power until the end of the turn.
2x Ewe Shall Pass - Move one of your minions to another base. Draw a card. You may play an extra action.
1x Hello, Dolly! - Special: Play after another player plays an action. Copy the ability of that action.
1x In Sheep’s Clothing - Play on a minion. Ongoing: After another minion moves from here to another base, you may move this minion to there as well and destroy this action.
1x On the Lamb - Choose a base where you have a minion, and another player. Move that minion and all of that player’s minions there to a single other base.
1x Shearing - Play on a minion. Draw a card. Ongoing: This minion has -2 power. At the start of your turn, return this action to your hand.
2x To Follow, or Not? - Choose another player. Choose a random action in their discard pile. Play it as an extra action or return it. Draw a card.
1x Wood for Sheep - Choose another player. Reveal a random card from their hand. You may place a card from your hand into their hand to play the revealed card. Otherwise return it and play an extra action.
actions:
1x Counting Sheep - Play on a base. Ongoing: Once per turn, after the power of another player’s minion increases, your minions here gain +1 power until the end of the turn.

2x Ewe Shall Pass - Move one of your minions to another base. Draw a card. You may play an extra action.

1x Hello, Dolly! - Special: Play after another player plays an action. Copy the ability of that action.

1x In Sheep’s Clothing - Play on a minion. Ongoing: After another minion moves from here to another base, you may move this minion to there as well and destroy this action.

1x On the Lamb - Choose a base where you have a minion, and another player. Move that minion and all of that player’s minions there to a single other base.

1x Shearing - Play on a minion. Draw a card. Ongoing: This minion has -2 power. At the start of your turn, return this action to your hand.

2x To Follow, or Not? - Choose another player. Choose a random action in their discard pile. Play it as an extra action or return it. Draw a card.

1x Wood for Sheep - Choose another player. Reveal a random card from their hand. You may place a card from your hand into their hand to play the revealed card. Otherwise return it and play an extra action.
characters:
1x Little Bo Peep - power 5 - Ongoing: Other players can not move minions to or from here. Talent: Move one of your minions to here.

2x Ram - power 4 - Talent: Move this minion to another base, then you may return a minion of power 2 or less at that base to its owner’s hand.

3x Black Sheep - power 4 - Ongoing: After another minion is played here, move this minion to another base.

4x Flock - power 2 - Ongoing: After another minion moves from here to another base, move this minion to there as well.
clarifications:
Here are the official clarifications as they appear in Smash Up Sheep Promo insert:

Black Sheep: Black Sheep’s ability has it moved by its controller, so Little Bo Peep does not block the ability unless they have different controllers. It is also not blocked by cards like Incorporeal.

Counting Sheep: The other player’s minion does not have to be at Counting Sheep’s base to trigger it. This card does not affect minions played after this card. (updated by The Bigger Geekier Box)

Hello, Dolly!: This acts as if the ability of the action being copied were printed on it. If it copies an action that is played on a minion or a base, it is also played on a minion or base, and not necessarily the same one. Hello, Dolly! can copy actions that have conditions for being played (e.g. Make Contact, Cosplay) without having to fulfill those conditions; it has its own conditions for being played, so the other card’s conditions are moot.

On the Lamb: You may choose a player with no minions there and move “all” those minions, even if someone else does have minions there. All the minions go to the same base.

Shearing: If Shearing leaves play before the start of your next turn, you do not return it to your hand.

To Follow or Not...?, Wood for Sheep: If you play another player’s card, you control it and its ability is carried out from your point of view; when it leaves play it goes back to the owner’s hand, deck, or discard pile.

Flock: This cannot follow minions that move after a base scores. (added by The Bigger Geekier Box)
effects:
The Sheep faction excels at dynamic movement, often triggered by the play or relocation of other minions. By leveraging cards that share similar movement cues, Sheep can rapidly converge on a single base, unleashing a surge of power to overwhelm their opponents. However, this responsiveness also extends to opponents' minions, making strategic management crucial - a challenge that Little Bo Peep can help mitigate.

Sheep also employ a subset of cards that enable them to mimic their opponents' actions and pilfer random cards from their decks, effectively compensating for the limitations inherent to their movement-focused approach.

name: Skeletons
teaser: Bury cards, especially minions from your discard pile, and boost them with +1 power counters when you uncover them.
mechanics: Bury cards, especially minions from your discard pile, and boost them with +1 power counters when you uncover them.
description: The Skeletons faction is part of the 10th Anniversary set, bringing a unique set of abilities to the table. Although the set lacks a traditional rulebook, online descriptions reveal that this faction excels at exhuming and empowering minions, particularly those relegated to the discard pile. With a medium complexity rating, the Skeletons offer a balanced challenge. They are joined in the 10th Anniversary set by the Mermaids, Sheep, and World Champs factions.
cardsTeaser:
The Skeletons faction is comprised of 10 minions and 10 actions, offering a balanced mix of creatures and abilities. In terms of raw power, their minions boast a total base power of 30, averaging 3 power per minion.

Delving into their actions, the Skeletons have no actions that are specifically designed to be played on minions. However, they do have two actions that can be played on bases: Gravestones and Graveyard. The majority of their actions are standard, with eight options available, including two that can affect one or more minions: Burst Forth, Dig ’em Up, Grave Goods (which appears twice), Hearse Fleet, Place ‘em Down, Spooky, and Scary (also appearing twice). Notably, two of their actions - both instances of Grave Goods - have the ability to directly increase a minion's power.
actionTeaser: The Skeletons faction unleashes a horde of undead minions to overwhelm opponents, using actions that summon, bolster, and manipulate their bony ranks to devastating effect. By leveraging their skeletal army, players can execute a variety of strategic maneuvers to outmaneuver their foes.
actionList:
1x Burst Forth - Special: Before a base scores, uncover one of your buried cards there.
1x Dig ’em Up - Choose a base. Uncover up to three of your buried cards there.
2x Grave Goods - Bury a card from your hand, and you may discard a card to bury another one; OR uncover one of your buried cards, and if it is a minion, place two +1 power counters on it.
1x Gravestones - Play on a base. Ongoing: After a minion is uncovered here, you may place a +1 power counter on it. Special: After this base scores, bury this card on another base.
1x Graveyard - Play on a base. Talent: Uncover one of your buried cards here. If it is a minion, you may place a +1 power counter on it.
1x Hearse Fleet - Move any number of your buried cards from one base to another. Special: You may play this card before a base scores to move up to two of your buried cards to or from that base instead.
1x Place ‘em Down - Bury up to three minions from your discard pile with total power of 6 or less.
2x Spooky, Scary... - Bury a minion of power 3 or less from your discard pile. Draw a card.
actions:
1x Burst Forth - Special: Before a base scores, uncover one of your buried cards there.

1x Dig ’em Up - Choose a base. Uncover up to three of your buried cards there.

2x Grave Goods - Bury a card from your hand, and you may discard a card to bury another one; OR uncover one of your buried cards, and if it is a minion, place two +1 power counters on it.

1x Gravestones - Play on a base. Ongoing: After a minion is uncovered here, you may place a +1 power counter on it. Special: After this base scores, bury this card on another base.

1x Graveyard - Play on a base. Talent: Uncover one of your buried cards here. If it is a minion, you may place a +1 power counter on it.

1x Hearse Fleet - Move any number of your buried cards from one base to another. Special: You may play this card before a base scores to move up to two of your buried cards to or from that base instead.

1x Place ‘em Down - Bury up to three minions from your discard pile with total power of 6 or less.

2x Spooky, Scary... - Bury a minion of power 3 or less from your discard pile. Draw a card.

[FACTION ICON]
characters:
1x Lord of Bones - power 5 - Ongoing: After another minion is uncovered, you may place a +1 power counter on it. Talent: Bury a card from your hand here or uncover one of your buried cards here.

2x Gravetender - power 4 - Ongoing: Once per turn, after one of your other cards is buried or uncovered, draw a card.

3x Revenant - power 3 - Special: On your turn, you may bury this card from your discard pile. Use only one Revenant ability per turn.

4x Returned One - power 2 - You may bury this minion here. Special: After this card is uncovered, you may uncover another one of your buried cards here.
clarifications: There are no official clarifications for this faction as no rulebook was made for the 10th Anniversary set.
effects: The Skeletons faction excels at manipulating cards in and out of the buried state, with a particular emphasis on minions, especially those relegated to the discard pile. Their abilities enable the burial of cards, as well as their retrieval outside of the typical Start Turn phase. Additionally, they can endow uncovered minions with +1 power counters, bolstering their strength. One key benefit of burying cards is that they become largely insulated from opposing effects, allowing you to strategically deploy them at an opportune moment.

name: World Champs
teaser: Draw cards, play extra actions and boost your minions' power.
mechanics: Draw cards, play extra actions and boost your minions' power.
description: The World Champs faction is part of the 10th Anniversary set, joining Mermaids, Sheep, and Skeletons. This unique faction is built entirely from cards introduced in earlier sets. Their strategy revolves around enhancing gameplay with abilities that allow for extra actions, increased card draw, and empowered minions. As one of four factions in the 10th Anniversary set, the World Champs offer a distinct playstyle that leverages familiar cards in new ways.
cardsTeaser:
The World Champs faction is composed of 10 minions and 10 actions, offering a balanced mix of gameplay options. Their minions boast a total base power of 30, averaging 3 power per minion. 

Delving into their actions, the World Champs have a range of cards that can be played on minions, including Bewitched, Shark Tattoo, and Smart Set-Up, totaling 3 play-on-minion actions. They also feature a single play-on-base action, High-Speed Chase. The faction's standard actions are led by 6 key cards: Eh?, Fast As Lightning, Fighting Spirit Prize, It’s Blitzin’ Time!, Kaiju Conflict, and Mouse, Bird and Sausage, with 5 of these affecting one or more minions. Notably, 7 actions within the faction directly enhance a minion's power: Bewitched, Eh?, Fast As Lightning, Fighting Spirit Prize, It’s Blitzin’ Time!, Mouse, Bird and Sausage, and Shark Tattoo.
actionTeaser: The World Champs faction leverages their athletic prowess to dominate the playing field, utilizing actions that showcase their impressive skills and teamwork. By combining powerful plays with clever strategies, they can outmaneuver their opponents and emerge victorious.
actionList:
1x Bewitched - Play on a minion. Ongoing: This minion has +2 power. If this minion leaves play, transfer this action to another minion.
1x Eh? - Special: After you play your first action in a turn, you may play this card as an extra action. One of your minions gains +1 power until the end of the turn, and you may place this card back into your hand instead of the discard pile.
1x Fast as Lightning - Choose a minion. Until the end of the turn, it gains +2 power, and if it would go to the discard pile it is returned to its owner’s hand instead.
1x Fighting Spirit Prize - Draw two cards and place two +1 power counters total on your minions.
1x High-Speed Chase - Play on a base. Talent: Transfer this action to another base to move one of your minions from here to there. That minion gains +3 power until the end of the turn.
1x It’s Blitzin’ Time! - One of your minions gains +3 power until the end of the turn.
1x Kaiju Conflict - Play two extra actions.
1x Mouse, Bird and Sausage - Choose up to two minions of the same faction at a base to gain +2 power each until the end of the turn.
1x Shark Tattoo - Play on one of your minions. Place a +1 power counter on it. Ongoing: At the start of your turn, if this is your only minion here, place a +1 power counter on this minion.
1x Smart Set-Up - Play on another player’s minion. Ongoing: After the first time each turn a minion is played here, draw a card.

[FACTION ICON]
characters:
1x Sheriff - power 5 - Special: Before this base scores, this minion may duel another player’s minion here. Destroy the losing minion.

1x Aramis - power 4 - Ongoing: Once during your turn, after you play an action that directly affects this minion, you may play an action that directly affects this minion as an extra action.

1x Stoneford - power 4 - Search your deck for an action and place it into your hand.

1x Akye the Turtle - power 3 - You may place a card from your hand into another player’s hand to draw two cards

1x Diva - power 3 - Ongoing: Once each turn, when a standard action directly affects one or more of your other minions here, you may choose this minion to be affected the same way.

1x Shield Maiden - power 3 - Reveal the top card of another player’s deck. If it is an action, or a minion of power 3 or less, place it into your hand. Otherwise, return it.

1x Calicoin - power 2 - You may place +1 power counter on another minion here.

1x Mummy - power 2 - Ongoing: After this base scores, you may bury this minion on another base.

1x Rainbow Girl - power 2 - Your other minions here gain +1 power until the end of the turn.

1x Samurai-Chan - power 2 - Ongoing: After this minion goes to the discard pile from play, draw a card.
clarifications: There are no official clarifications for this faction as no rulebook was made for the 10th Anniversary set.
